collections.name: Primitives
collections.description: Layer 1 — raw color ramps, spacing, typography scale, radius, shadow, border-width, motion, and z-index.

default.value: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", sans-serif
ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, "Times New Roman", Times, serif
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace

collections.name: Semantic · Color
collections.description: Themable colour semantics — surface/text/border/brand/action/feedback/focus-ring across Light and Dark modes.

tokens.name: surface-inverse
tokens.description: 툴팁과 반전 표면에 쓰는 역상 표면 색상

tokens.name: text-static-dark
tokens.description: 다크/라이트 모드에 영향받지 않는 고정 다크 텍스트

tokens.name: text-static-light
tokens.description: 다크/라이트 모드에 영향받지 않는 고정 라이트 텍스트

collections.name: Semantic · Typography
collections.description: Typography roles — text-display through text-code, plus weight, ui-size, font-family, line-height, and letter-spacing.

tokens.name: text-ui-size-xs
tokens.description: UI 라벨 크기 (xs) — Badge sm, Avatar xs-fallback

tokens.name: font-mono
tokens.description: 모노스페이스 font family — code, meta label, 단축키 등

tokens.name: line-height-tight
tokens.description: 타이트한 line-height (1.2) — 텍스트 스케일과 독립적인 직접 사용용

tokens.name: letter-spacing-tight
tokens.description: 타이트 letter-spacing (-0.02em) — 큰 헤딩, dialog title 등

tokens.name: font-sans
tokens.description: 산세리프 font family — default UI, body, rank label

tokens.name: font-serif
tokens.description: 세리프 font family — editorial text, long-form accent

collections.name: Semantic · Spacing
collections.description: Layout spacing — inline/stack/inset scales, plus size and focus-ring offset.

tokens.name: space-inset-2xl
tokens.description: 내부 패딩 · 2xl (20px, lg와 xl 사이의 갭 채움. 값 순서 비단조: 2xl < xl. Stage 6에서 inset 스케일 리네이밍 검토.)

tokens.name: focus-ring-offset
tokens.description: Focus ring outline-offset — 모든 focusable 컴포넌트 공통. 디자인 결정값이라 primitive 매핑 없음 (MAPPING.md exceptions 섹션 참고).

tokens.name: z-dropdown
tokens.description: Tooltip, Dropdown menu — 가장 가벼운 floating

tokens.name: z-overlay
tokens.description: Popover — 트리거 근처에 떠 있는 패널

tokens.name: z-toast
tokens.description: Toast — 모든 레이어 위, 모달 위에도 표시

collections.name: Components
collections.description: Layer 3 — per-component knobs. Override these to retheme a single component without editing the system.

tokens.name: badge-padding-x-sm
tokens.description: rounded sm — relies on min-width=height for counts

tokens.name: toast-z-index
tokens.description: spec exception — Layer 2 has no z-index

tokens.name: tabs-sticky-bg
tokens.description: 스티키 상태일 때 탭 리스트 배경 — 패널 콘텐츠가 비치지 않도록

tokens.name: alert-title-spacing-message
tokens.description: Gap between the alert title and the message paragraph. Decoupled from `--c-alert-actions-margin-top` so reducing this does not also pull the action buttons closer.

tokens.name: button-badge-min-size
tokens.description: Minimum width and height of the inline badge chip.

tokens.name: button-badge-padding-x
tokens.description: Horizontal padding inside the badge chip for multi-digit counts.

tokens.name: button-badge-radius
tokens.description: Corner radius of the badge chip. 999px = fully pill-shaped.

tokens.name: button-badge-font-size
tokens.description: Text size of the badge label.

tokens.name: button-badge-font-weight
tokens.description: Text weight of the badge label.

tokens.name: avatar-status-ring-gap
tokens.description: Thickness of the halo stroke that separates the avatar portrait from the status ring. Rendered as an outline filled with --c-avatar-status-ring-stroke-color.

tokens.name: avatar-status-ring-stroke-color
tokens.description: Colour of the halo stroke between the avatar portrait and the status ring. Defaults to --s-surface-card so it tracks Light/Dark themes (white in light mode, near-black in dark mode).

tokens.name: avatar-live-gradient
tokens.description: Gradient painted on the live status ring around an avatar. Defaults to an Instagram-Stories-style linear sweep (yellow → pink → purple at 135°). Linear and radial render predictably on the thin ring; angular / diamond / mesh are designed for 2D fills and tend to look fragmented on a narrow stroke.

tokens.name: badge-icon-size-sm
tokens.description: Icon font-size in a small badge (tighter than feedback-icon-size to keep the chip balanced).

tokens.name: badge-icon-size-md
tokens.description: Icon font-size in a medium badge.

tokens.name: badge-icon-size-lg
tokens.description: Icon font-size in a large badge.

tokens.name: button-soft-bg-default
tokens.description: Default translucent background for the soft button variant.

tokens.name: button-soft-bg-hover
tokens.description: Hover background for the soft button variant.

tokens.name: button-soft-bg-active
tokens.description: Pressed background for the soft button variant.

tokens.name: button-soft-bg-disabled
tokens.description: Disabled background for the soft button variant.

tokens.name: button-soft-backdrop-blur
tokens.description: Backdrop blur radius for the soft button variant.

tokens.name: button-soft-backdrop-saturation
tokens.description: Backdrop saturation multiplier for the soft button variant.

tokens.name: button-soft-shadow
tokens.description: Subtle inner highlight for the soft button variant. Border remains transparent so the style has no outline.

tokens.name: sidebar-collapsed-vertical-gap
tokens.description: Vertical gap between top-level collapsed sidebar nav entries.

tokens.name: sidebar-collapsed-item-gap
tokens.description: Vertical gap between items inside a collapsed sidebar group.

tokens.name: sidebar-collapsed-group-end-gap
tokens.description: Bottom spacing after a collapsed sidebar group.

tokens.name: text-tone-static-dark-color
tokens.description: 다크/라이트 모드에 영향받지 않는 고정 다크 텍스트 색상

tokens.name: text-tone-static-light-color
tokens.description: 다크/라이트 모드에 영향받지 않는 고정 라이트 텍스트 색상

tokens.name: section-title-gap
tokens.description: Gap between SectionTitle copy and actions.

tokens.name: section-title-main-gap
tokens.description: Gap between SectionTitle icon and heading.

tokens.name: section-title-copy-gap
tokens.description: Gap between SectionTitle heading and subtitle.

default.value: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--s-brand-bg), color-mix(in srgb, var(--s-brand-bg-hover) 82%, var(--s-brand-bg)))

tokens.name: badge-height-xl
tokens.description: xl — matches Chip md height (28px) so Badge and Chip can sit in the same row without visual reflow.

extensions.note: Converted from YOVO Design System 2. Primitives + Components live in single collections; the semantic layer is split by domain so only colour carries Light/Dark modes (matching the source design system rule "Spacing & typography do not theme").
